videos.headline: Dont'e Thornton Jr. goes 66-yards for Vols TD
videos.description: Tennessee QB Nico Iamaleava passes to Dont'e Thornton Jr., who speeds 66 yards for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dont'e Thornton Jr. goes 66-yards for Vols TD) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee forces early turnover on downs
videos.description: Oklahoma decides to go for it early on fourth-and-two, but Tennessee stops them and takes over on downs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee forces early turnover on downs) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jackson Arnold throws it right to a Tennessee DB for an INT
videos.description: Oklahoma QB Jackson Arnold tries to throw downfield, but is intercepted by Tennessee's Jermod McCoy.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jackson Arnold throws it right to a Tennessee DB for an INT) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: OU's Jovantae Barnes shaken up after big hit
videos.description: Oklahoma's Jovantae Barnes rushes for 17 yards, but gets hit hard and appears to be shaken up on the play.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (OU's Jovantae Barnes shaken up after big hit) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee, Oklahoma trade fumbles on back-to-back plays
videos.description: Tennessee fumbles on a strip sack, and on the very next play, Oklahoma QB Jackson Arnold fumbles the ball right back to the Volunteers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee, Oklahoma trade fumbles on back-to-back plays) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee forces a safety to extend lead
videos.description: Oklahoma RB Jovantae Barnes gets tackled in his own end zone, giving Tennessee a safety to extend its lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee forces a safety to extend lead) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kirk Herbstreit blasts players for faking injuries: 'It's unethical as hell'
videos.description: Kirk Herbstreit goes off on players appearing to fake injuries against tempo offenses after Oklahoma's Da'Jon Terry seems to do just that.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kirk Herbstreit blasts players for faking injuries: 'It's unethical as hell') 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tennessee, Oklahoma trade fumbles on back-to-back plays ... again
videos.description: For the second time in the game, Tennessee and Oklahoma trade fumbles on back-to-back plays.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tennessee, Oklahoma trade fumbles on back-to-back plays ... again) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dylan Sampson punches it in for Tennessee
videos.description: Tennessee RB Dylan Sampson muscles across the goal line for a touchdown, extending the Volunteers' lead over Oklahoma.

videos.description: Tennessee QB Nico Iamaleava lobs a 42-yard pass to Bru McCoy, who makes an excellent catch for a first down.
